banner.title: A vibrant culinary destination where families come together.
banner.subtitle: Ruchi's Family Restaurant — bringing authentic Indian flavors, warm hospitality, and memorable celebrations to Tiptur, Karnataka.

philosophy.title: What makes Ruchi's special.
philosophy.subtitle: Simple principles that guide everything we do in the kitchen and beyond.

items.title: Family First
items.description: Every decision — from menu choices to décor — is made with families in mind. A space where everyone feels welcome.

items.title: Authentic Flavors
items.description: We stay true to traditional recipes, using fresh spices ground daily and techniques passed down through generations.

items.title: Warm Hospitality
items.description: Our staff is trained to be attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring about every guest's experience.

items.title: Celebrate Together
items.description: From birthday parties to kitty parties — we create spaces and moments for people to come together and celebrate.

process.title: How a meal at Ruchi's unfolds.
process.subtitle: From the moment you walk in to the last bite — every step is crafted for your comfort.

steps.title: A warm welcome
steps.description: Our staff greets you and guides you to your preferred seating — main hall, rooftop, or party room.

steps.title: Explore the menu
steps.description: Our knowledgeable staff helps you navigate our diverse menu and recommends dishes based on your preferences.

steps.title: Freshly prepared dishes
steps.description: Every dish is made to order with fresh ingredients, traditional spices, and careful attention to presentation.

steps.title: Relax and celebrate
steps.description: Take your time, enjoy the ambience, and let us handle the rest. This is your time with family.

team.title: The people behind the flavors.
team.subtitle: A dedicated team that's passionate about food and hospitality.

members.name: Head Chef
members.bio: With years of experience in multi-cuisine cooking, our head chef brings authentic flavors from across India to your plate.

members.name: Service Manager
members.bio: Ensuring every guest has a seamless and memorable dining experience from start to finish.
